journal_entry.description: Customer deposit received for moving services to be performed in one month
journal_entry.rationale: Under IFRS 15, revenue cannot be recognized until the performance obligation is satisfied. The moving services will be performed in one month, so the $5,000 deposit received is a liability (unearned revenue/customer deposit) until the services are provided. Cash increases (debit asset) and a liability increases (credit). Both tuples show one line each: debit tuple (1,0,0,0,0,0) = one asset increase, credit tuple (1,0,0,0,0,0) = one liability increase. No tax is applicable at this stage because revenue recognition has not occurred yet.

output.reason: Upon receiving the $5,000 deposit via bank transfer, the chequing account (a bank asset) increases. This is recorded as a debit to the bank/cash asset account. There is 1 debit line representing an asset increase.

debit_classifier.reason: Upon receiving the $5,000 deposit via bank transfer, the chequing account (a bank asset) increases. This is recorded as a debit to the bank/cash asset account. There is 1 debit line representing an asset increase.

output.reason: The transaction has two credit-side components: (1) Cash/chequing account increases by $5,000, which is an asset increase on the debit side, not credit. (2) Atlas receives $5,000 before performing the service, creating an obligation to perform the service in the future. This is unearned revenue (a liability increase) = 1 line. The revenue itself won't be recognized until the service is performed in one month (per IFRS 15 revenue recognition). Credit side: Unearned Revenue/Deferred Revenue liability increase.

credit_classifier.reason: The transaction has two credit-side components: (1) Cash/chequing account increases by $5,000, which is an asset increase on the debit side, not credit. (2) Atlas receives $5,000 before performing the service, creating an obligation to perform the service in the future. This is unearned revenue (a liability increase) = 1 line. The revenue itself won't be recognized until the service is performed in one month (per IFRS 15 revenue recognition). Credit side: Unearned Revenue/Deferred Revenue liability increase.
